recommendations.action: Increase Redis cache TTL and implement cache warming
recommendations.rationale: Current hit rate (75.0%) below optimal threshold (80%+)
recommendations.estimated_impact: Improve hit rate by 10.0 percentage points
implementation_steps: Increase Redis cache TTL from 5 days to 7 days
Implement cache warming for frequently accessed patterns
Add cache hit/miss metrics to monitoring dashboard
Review and optimize cache key patterns for better locality

recommendations.action: Optimize parallel worker scheduling and ownership claim patterns
recommendations.rationale: Current worker efficiency (66.7%) indicates scheduling optimization opportunities
recommendations.estimated_impact: Improve throughput by 15-20% through better parallelization
implementation_steps: Implement dynamic worker pool sizing based on queue depth
Add ownership claim timeouts to prevent stale locks
Optimize story batching to reduce context switching
Add cadence monitoring dashboard with real-time metrics
